The '''Yoggoy hive''' was a [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] hive on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yoggoy]]. In [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], the ''[[Tachyon Flier]]'' crash-landed on Yoggoy, with [[Raynar Thul]], [[Lomi Plo]], and [[Welk]] onboard. The Yoggoy then absorbed Raynar and became the first hive of [[the Colony]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}}
